ModMetaData.name: Quest Target Info
ModMetaData.author: Escarval
ModMetaData.description:
Quest Target Info shows compact travel information for world-map targets.
Use it to quickly check route distance, transport range and estimated fuel requirements for quest targets, selected world objects and selected world tiles.
Travel information can appear in the quest travel window and in the world inspect Travel tab.
Supported transport sections include transport pods, shuttles and gravships. Odyssey-specific information is shown when the DLC is active.
The display can be customized with compact mode, unavailable transport visibility and per-transport visibility settings.
